title: Log Record
description: Canonical structured-log envelope. Aligned with OpenTelemetry logs data model and ECS (Elastic Common Schema) where compatible. Records that fail validation are not silently dropped: they are routed to the schema-violation dead-letter stream and counted against the producing service's data-quality SLO (Chapter 8, Section 6).

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp in UTC with millisecond precision (e.g. 2026-05-12T14:03:11.482Z).

observed_timestamp.description: Collector ingest timestamp; populated by the pipeline, not by the producer.

severity_number.description: OpenTelemetry severity number. 1-4 trace, 5-8 debug, 9-12 info, 13-16 warn, 17-20 error, 21-24 fatal.

body.description: Free-form message body. PII patterns enumerated in Chapter 23 Section 4 are stripped at source.

trace_id.description: 16-byte W3C Trace Context trace id, lowercase hex. Required for any log emitted within an active span.

attributes.description: Event-level attributes. Required keys depend on service tier; see Chapter 17 Section 4 for the per-tier required-field matrix.

user.session.id.description: SHA-256 hash of session id; never the raw value.
